title: Leave, Liberty and Administrative Absence
summary: All O-5 and O-6 Level Commands. 11 items across the program.
applicabilityLevel: All O-5 and O-6 Level Commands

source.title: IGMC Functional Area Checklist - Leave, Liberty and Administrative Absence
source.publisher: Inspector General of the Marine Corps

items.question: Has the command published a directive or established a program on leave and liberty?
Is lost leave restored as special leave accrual (SLA) when Marines were eligible and approved for SLA?
Have internal controls for check-out and check-in procedures been established to ensure requests, approvals, execution, and close out of all leave/PTAD is completed in MOL?
references: MCO 1050.3J, chap 2, par 5; chap 3, par 1a and 1b; chap 4, par 8

items.question: Are Marines granted PTAD only for the purposes permitted in the reference?
Are periods of absence over leave and absent without leave, when excused as unavoidable, charged as annual leave when appropriate?

Are chargeable leave periods being reported on MOL or UD? (check morning reports for individuals marked as on leave with no corresponding approved leave request in MOL and that check-out and check-in were completed)
Does the command have procedures to ensure Marines are not being approved for Active-Duty Parental Leave for no more than 84 days?
